arts.ttl: Everton missing five players for Aston Villa as David Moyes issues update
arts.sum: Calvert-Lewin missed Everton's FA Cup third round victory over Peterborough last Thursday due to an ankle injury, but has now resumed training. Speaking in his first press conference after taking the Everton job, Moyes said: “Dominic has trained today (Monday), so we think he should be okay.

arts.ttl: Watch every Donyell Malen Bundesliga goal and assist
arts.sum: Aston Villa completed the £21.5m (€26m) signing of Borussia Dortmund’s Donyell Malen on Tuesday, and now you can watch the Dutchman’s every Bundesliga goal and assist. It brings an end…

arts.ttl: Aston Villa XI vs Everton – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Aston Villa head to Goodison Park to face Everton in the Premier League on Thursday evening. Unai Emery’s team are five points adrift of the Champions League places, with their league form inconsistent in recent weeks. arts.ttl: 'Not his fault' - Pat Nevin names the Everton player key to survival under David Moyes
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE: Pat Nevin believes that David Moyes doesn't get the credit he deserves as a tactician and the returning Everton manager must try to get more out of Iliman Ndiaye

arts.ttl: Sean Dyche releases statement on Everton sacking and sends message to returning David Moyes
arts.sum: Sean Dyche was brutally sacked by Everton last week, with the Toffees choosing to re-appoint former boss David Moyes - and he has now spoken out on his departure

arts.ttl: Aston Villa ‘very serious’ about signing – Villa officials in sports director’s office yesterday
arts.sum: On Tuesday, Sevilla sporting director Víctor Orta said his club haven’t received any offers for Loïc Badé amid claims Aston Villa director Monchi visited them. Estadio Deportivo have investigated this and provide updates on Aston Villa’s chances of securing the defender’s services in the winter market. arts.ttl: Moyes will push Everton forward - Dyche
arts.sum: Former Everton manager Sean Dyche says successor David Moyes will "build on the stable footing we have implemented".

arts.ttl: Everton vs. Aston Villa: Unai Emery's side looking to set new club record at Goodison Park
arts.sum: Aston Villa will be bidding to set a new club record when they square off against Everton in the Premier League on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: Right time to leave amid one of Everton’s ‘toughest periods’ – Sean Dyche
arts.sum: The former Burnley boss spent two years at Goodison Park.
